en: So do you recognize any of these men I was hiding in the bathroom stall so I didn't see his face
ko: 그래서 이 남자들 중 누군가를 알아보나요? 화장실 칸막이에 숨었어서 얼굴을 못 봤어요.

en: But I heard him. He was singing along to the music at the bar. Do you remember what he was singing?
ko: 하지만 그의 목소리는 들었어요. 바에서 음악에 맞춰 노래하고 있었거든요.

en: I think it was that song. I want it that way Backstreet Boys. I'm familiar. Okay
ko: 그 노래 같아요. "I Want It That Way" 백스트리트 보이즈.

en: Number one. Could you please sing the opening to I want it that way really?
ko: "I want it that way"의 시작 부분을 정말 불러줄 수 있어?

en: Okay You are my fire Desire
Number two keep it going the one Desire
Number three believe when I say number four. I want it that way
ko: 세 번째는 내가 말할 때 믿어, 네 번째는.

en: Tell me why ain't nothing but a heartache
ko: 이유를 말해줘. 이건 단지 마음의 고통일 뿐이야.

en: Tell me why ain't nothing but a mistake
ko: 이유를 말해줘. 이건 단지 실수일 뿐이야.

en: Number five, I never wanna hear you say
ko: 이제 5번, 당신의 말을 듣고 싶지 않아.

en: Ha chills literal chills, it was number five number five killed my brother. Oh my god. I forgot about that part
